title: Fracture risk documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
investigations.rationale: The exact DoH fracture-risk section supports onset or interval history, functional impact, associated history, relevant negatives, patient goals and clinician risk context in an age-qualified osteoporosis-screening context without calculating risk.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

investigations.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
investigations.rationale: The exact risk-factor section supports measured weight or BMI, focused endocrine or musculoskeletal assessment, reviewed laboratory context and prior correspondence only when available.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact DEXA section supports clinician-entered plan and arranged follow-up after clinician review; it does not select DEXA, calculate FRAX or assign osteoporosis.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

source_limitations: Age, sex, fracture history, falls, family history, smoking, alcohol, medicines, secondary causes, BMI, DEXA, FRAX, diagnosis and plan remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
